name: Tool Call Accuracy
summary: Judges whether an agent's tool calls satisfy a query given the tool definitions and intended pipeline use, returning a binary verdict plus a failure category.
description: A reference-free LLM-as-a-Judge for agent tool use. Given the user query, the available tool definitions, a description of the intended pipeline use, and the tool calls the agent actually made, it decides whether the calls are fully correct — right tools, right arguments, right order, no missing or spurious or hallucinated calls. It returns a binary accuracy verdict (1 = fully correct, 0 = not), a short reasoning, and — on failure — a single category (e.g. Wrong Arguments, Missing Required Tool Calls, Hallucinated Tool).
